meaning: 彼翁(在世期100BC,古希腊田园诗人,作品仅有<<田园诗>>残篇传世) ;n.[生]生物体(指独立单一的有机体)
examples: Wilfred Bion was one of the most influential thinkers and practitioners of the object relations theory in the late 20th century.
According to Bion, containment not only is the earliest way of communication between mother and infant, but should be the mode of interaction between patient and psychoanalyst as well.
The two monkeys were part of the joint Russian-American Bion 11 mission in 1997, flying aboard the space shuttle.
